---
layout: cv
title: Isaac Newtons's CV
---
# Isaac Newton
Physicist, Mathematician, Cambridge professor.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="isaac@applesdofall.org">isaac@applesdofall.org</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
</div>


## Currently

Reaching for the stars

### Specialized in

Supply  Chain, logistics, inventory management, procurement, warehousing


### Research interests

Gaming, Knives, food, swimming, optimization, operations and operations of anything


## Education

2014 - 2017
Mountain View High School, Meridian ID

2021 - 2026
Brigham Young University - Idaho, 
Bachelor of Science in Supply Chain Management, expected graduation 2026

## Awards

'2026'
Hyrum Smith Award


## Occupation

Intern
Occasions Group

Package Handler
Fed Ex Ground

Supervisor
Flying Pie Pizzaria

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
